title: compaction_recall-affordance — minimal C4
description: Root-level C4 only (per plan-builder SKILL §12.1 c4-minimal convention). Component-level diagrams subsumed by IDEF0 + GRAFCET in idef0.json / grafcet.json.

systems.name: OpenCode runtime
systems.description: Single-process bun daemon hosting session runloop, compaction, tool registry, and provider integrations.

containers.name: Compaction subsystem
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/compaction.ts. Hosts narrative kind path + buildUserPayload + defaultWriteAnchor. L1 lives here.

containers.name: Recall tool
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/tool/recall.ts (new). L2: AI-callable tool exposing tool_call_id → original output lookup.

containers.name: Memory.Hybrid
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/memory.ts. Hosts recallByCallId (new) and existing recallMessage. Pure view over Session.messages stream.

containers.name: Prompt assembly
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts. Hosts applyStreamAnchorRebind + system-block assembly. L3 lives adjacent to this.

containers.name: Tool registry
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts. Registers RecallTool unconditionally in the build agent's catalog.

components.name: buildUserPayload
components.description: L1 surface — assembles LLM_compact prompt. Modified to inject TOOL_INDEX_INSTRUCTION.

components.name: defaultWriteAnchor
components.description: Post-write hook for L1 validation (validateToolIndex + telemetry).

components.name: validateToolIndex
components.description: New helper. Regex-scans anchor body for ## TOOL_INDEX section; counts entries.

components.name: Memory.Hybrid.recallByCallId
components.description: New helper — scans Session.messages for ToolPart with matching callID. Sibling of existing recallMessage.

components.name: amnesia notice injector
components.description: Reads most-recent anchor kind; conditionally injects system_block_amnesia_notice. Lives adjacent to applyStreamAnchorRebind.

relationships.description: consumes Session.messages stream via Hybrid accessors
invokes recallByCallId during AI tool call
reads most-recent anchor metadata to decide L3 injection
